name: Diana Venicia
description:
“In a world of stages and bright lights, the Ultimate Cosmetologist is here to make everyone beautiful. Before working as a personal stylist for some of the biggest names in media, Diana was just a simple girl trying to make it through high school. Being friends with the most popular group in her school had its advantages, and gave this happy-go-lucky artist the opportunity she needed to show off her talents, and pursue her goal of helping everyone discover the best versions of themselves.”

I had this bot privated for a while, but I finally decided to post it publicly.

Update: Regarding the situation of what's been happening with the project, I've been very disheartened to learn what's happened regarding what Faza did and the victim, along with Aji.

I'll keep the bot up, but I implore you to please sign this petition:

https://www.change.org/p/get-fauzan-achmad-faza-blacklisted-from-iyuno
creator: Spidey-Dude
